arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday eight this weekend and James Mason has highlighted our writers' best bets for all seven games taking place in the top-flight on Saturday.

arts.ttl: “Strongest ever group of players” | Stuart Pearce excited by West Ham squad
arts.sum: Former West Ham player and coach Stuart Pearce believes this is the “strongest group of players” the club have ever had. Stuart Pearce made 48 appearances for the Hammers between 1999 and 2001, before going on to join David Moyes’ coaching team during his first spell in 2017/18. The Englishman returned for two years... arts.ttl: Paqueta wants 'misleading' leaks investigated by the FA
arts.sum: West Ham midfielder Lucas Paqueta wants the Football Association to investigate "misleading" leaks about his betting case.

arts.sum: Tottenham welcome London rivals West Ham to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to kick off the weekend’s Premier League action on Saturday. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the ...

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham truth revealed as Son Heung-min impact clear
arts.sum: In fact, according to a Global Fan Report from Chiliz, Tottenham's following in South Korea (42.3 per cent) is the largest share by a team in any particular country - far above Manchester United, Chelsea and Arsenal. In South Korea, it's said that 58% of supporters chose their oversees team due to an individual player - by far the highest of any nation.

arts.ttl: Tottenham player has decided his own future after Ange Postecoglou's crucial pre-season verdict
arts.sum: Showing just what he can do in an impressive second-half cameo appearance in the pre-season win away at Hearts, the defender continued to take his chance in the team's summer friendlies and also training to really make a mark on Postecoglou and his coaching team. Ange Postecoglou made it clear during pre-season that there was a place for Djed Spence in his squad if the Tottenham man continued to "take control of his own direction".
